overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring heavy neon lighting in cyan and magenta, light rain with reflective wet pavement, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a continuous journey from covered walkways through open plazas with vendor stalls and back to street level before entering a covered tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway adjacent to multi-lane street with moving traffic

events.description: futuristic black sports car drives past from right to left across the crosswalk
camera begins slight left turn while continuing forward, moving away from the covered walkway edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to a busy street, observing passing vehicles and neon signs

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving along the street, headlights illuminating the wet pavement

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a boot advertisement with cyan background
glass-fronted covered walkway with reflective surfaces and neon lighting
glowing red holographic advertisement suspended above the street
bold yellow and black striped crosswalk lines on the wet reflective pavement
massive concrete and metal overpass structure spanning the street above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking along a covered sidewalk. A large vertical advertisement screen dominates the left side while futuristic vehicles pass on the wet street. The elevated highway structure looms overhead, and neon signs cast colorful reflections on the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with benches and large digital screens

events.description: exits covered walkway and turns left into open plaza area, leaving the main street behind
pedestrian density increases as camera enters the plaza center with multiple people holding umbrellas

agents.ego_description: turning left into the open plaza and walking through the space, observing the surroundings and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking across the plaza

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with patterned pavement and scattered street furniture
yellow concrete benches arranged in the plaza center
tall building facade with vertical strips of illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a spacious urban plaza, transitioning from the sheltered walkway to an open area exposed to the light rain. Yellow benches and large digital screens become visible, while pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the space. The vertical advertisement screen recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with neon-lit vendor stalls and food carts

events.description: passing by a vendor stall with bright pink neon lighting on the left side
slight right turn to navigate around plaza furniture while heading toward street exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past vendor stalls, moving toward the street exit while avoiding other pedestrians

entered.detail: food vendor stall illuminated with bright pink neon lights and cyan accents
small food cart with cyan neon lighting and customers gathered around
low orange concrete barriers arranged in the plaza space

segments.scene_description: Walking through the central plaza area, the camera passes vibrant vendor stalls with pink and cyan neon lighting. The space features orange barriers and scattered pedestrians. The large building with vertical illumination remains visible ahead as the camera navigates toward the street exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level sidewalk with shop fronts and elevated highway overhead

events.description: exits plaza and returns to street-level sidewalk with moving traffic on the left
camera follows a pedestrian with green hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk following a pedestrian with distinctive green hair, passing shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing black top and patterned shorts

entered.detail: storefront with glass windows and neon signage, displaying various goods
small blue structure or kiosk on the sidewalk edge
dark tunnel entrance with red neon lighting visible in the distance
large concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the plaza onto a street-level sidewalk, following a pedestrian with bright green hair. Shop fronts with neon lighting line the right side while traffic moves on the left. The elevated highway structure runs overhead, and a tunnel entrance with red lighting becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway approaching tunnel

events.description: enters covered tunnel area with red and cyan neon lighting, sky no longer visible
lighting shifts to darker red tones as camera moves deeper into the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered tunnel area, moving from the open street into the enclosed passageway

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement posters mounted on the tunnel walls
red neon light strips lining the tunnel ceiling and walls
enclosed pedestrian passage with arched ceiling and artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered tunnel walkway, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed space with red and cyan neon lighting. The elevated highway structure continues overhead, supported by large concrete pillars. Wall-mounted advertisements line the left side as the camera moves deeper into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban sidewalk into a wide, rain-swept plaza filled with neon-lit commerce. It begins along a covered walkway where a massive vertical advertisement dominates the view and futuristic vehicles glide past on wet, reflective pavement beneath an elevated highway. As the camera turns left, the scene opens from the sheltered path into a spacious plaza exposed to the light rain, where yellow benches and pedestrians with umbrellas emerge. The perspective then shifts deeper into the central square, passing vibrant vendor stalls glowing in pink and cyan neon beside orange barriers. Finally, the camera navigates through the scattered crowd, keeping the towering illuminated building in sight while moving toward the street exit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open city street into the enclosed depths of a neon-lit underpass. It begins by exiting a plaza onto a sidewalk, trailing a pedestrian with bright green hair past glowing shop fronts and flowing traffic. As the camera moves forward under the shadow of an elevated highway, the open urban environment narrows toward a tunnel entrance bathed in red light. The scene then shifts into the covered walkway, transitioning from the rainy street to an enclosed space defined by red and cyan neon accents. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the underpass, passing large concrete pillars and wall-mounted advertisements that line the corridor.
